title: The Muddy Rugby Field
lines: Just outside the village lies a floodlit rugby field, though the lights have been shattered for weeks.
A group of zombies in tattered, blood-stained jerseys stands between you and the far corner of the pitch.
If you want to get to the Zoo on the other side, you'll have to break their line and score a try.

options.desc: 1. Attempt a low tackle on the closest zombie
2. Grunt and kick the mud at them
3. Sprint for the corner flag with all your speed
